_note: Event log for the Linnaeus trigger (L28, Red Hat Live Data track). The UI (TriggerView) ANONYMIZES every string at render via anonymize.ts, matching the synth-board pattern. scripts/watch-trigger.ts appends a new event here on each fire (newest first).

events.subject: nxtyou.io is live in production 🚀
events.reason: New direct-to-consumer (D2C) platform in production with shared backend/DB and an incomplete billing path — a new integration surface and operational gap for an agent to navigate.

events.subject: Need some nxtyou test data for Tony to look at
events.reason: Informal request to share test data between colleagues; no new platform, process, vendor, person change, or deploy signal.

events.subject: Scheduled drift sweep (weekly)
events.reason: Periodic operability re-check for decay that no discrete event caused (a stale runbook, a rotted dependency).
